content: According to Buddhist philosophy, a person can awaken from the "sleep of ignorance" by acknowledging the true nature of reality, which includes understanding the impermanence of all things, recognizing the interconnectedness of existence, and comprehending the concept of non-self (anatta).
raw_content: According to Buddhist philosophy, a person can awaken from the "sleep of ignorance" by acknowledging the true nature of reality, which includes understanding the impermanence of all things, recognizing the interconnectedness of existence, and comprehending the concept of non-self (anatta).
